evals.prompt: I want to write a 2,500-word reported feature on how default AI meeting transcription is changing what employees say at work. Build the workflow, but stop for my confirmation at the story maturity, hypothesis, architecture, and section-pattern gates. Do not draft before I approve.
evals.expected_output: A prefilled brief; 2–3 candidate story models; explicit AskUserQuestion gates; an OKF six-box research plan; and no premature draft.

evals.prompt: I have 12 interview notes, one policy PDF, survey data, and three scenes about return-to-office rules. Organize the material with stable source, claim, material, and section IDs; then propose a directory that tells me what every part does and how it expands.
evals.expected_output: OKF-style SRC/CLM/MAT/SEC records, evidence boxes, material placement, section jobs, expansion patterns, and a G3/G4 confirmation.

evals.prompt: Review this feature draft. First flag reporting and structure problems. Then make the language less AI-sounding while preserving every verified fact and quotation. Use my attached writing sample as the voice reference.
evals.expected_output: Substance-first review, structure review, voice profile, anti-AI audit, preserved facts/quotes, and a final G6 risk summary.

evals.prompt: Create a section plan for a reaction-led story. For each section choose one expansion tool and one sentence/rhythm tool, explain when it should be used, and ask me to approve the choices.
evals.expected_output: Reaction-led directory, EXP tool cards, STY tool selections, failure modes, and an AskUserQuestion approval gate.
